description: You are a network systems engineer working on an FPGA test harness. Your goal is to implement the core parsing logic for Ethernet, IPv4, TCP, and UDP headers within the packet_parser library located at /home/ga/PycharmProjects/packet_parser/. Using Python's struct module and bitwise operations, complete the implementations in parser/ethernet.py, parser/ipv4.py, parser/tcp.py, parser/udp.py, and parser/packet.py. Your implementation must handle malformed or truncated packets by raising the appropriate exceptions defined in parser/exceptions.py. Ensure all tests in the tests/ directory pass without modifying the test files.
